zh.Clopton, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾可洛普頓
zh.Besford, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾貝斯福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Besford於1386年出生在英國武斯特斯爾貝斯福德時，她的父親Alexander Besford67歲，母親Beatrice Thorndon64歲。她於1402年與William Clopton在英國武斯特斯爾貝斯福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1430年12月在她的家鄉享年45歲。

zh-hans.Clopton, Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾可洛普頓
zh-hans.Besford, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾貝斯福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Besford于1386年出生在英国武斯特斯爾貝斯福德时，她的父亲Alexander Besford67岁，母亲Beatrice Thorndon64岁。她于1402年与William Clopton在英国武斯特斯爾貝斯福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1430年12月在她的家乡享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Besford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Besford (Worcs) or Besford in Shawbury (Shrops).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Besford was born in 1386, in Besford, Worcestershire, England, her father, Alexander Besford, was 67 and her mother, Beatrice Thorndon, was 64. She married William Clopton in 1402, in Besford, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died about December 1430, in her hometown, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Besford est née en 1386, à Besford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Alexander Besford, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Thorndon, avait 64 ans. Elle a épousé William Clopton en 1402, à Besford, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ décembre 1430, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Besford 1386 in Besford, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Besford 67 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Thorndon 64. Sie hat 1402 in Besford, Worcestershire, England William Clopton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um Dezember 1430 im Alter von 45 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Besford è nata il nel 1386 nel Besford, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Alexander Besford, aveva 67 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Thorndon, aveva 64 anni. Lei sposato William Clopton nel 1402, nel Besford, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa dicembre 1430, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.Besford, Worcestershire, England: イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベスフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Besfordが1386年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベスフォードで生まれた時，父Alexander Besfordは67歳，母Beatrice Thorndonは64歳であった。1402年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベスフォードでWilliam Cloptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1430年12月に故郷で45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Besford(이)가 1386년 영국 워스스터실르 베스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Besford(은)는 67세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Thorndon(은)는 64세였다. 그녀는 1402년 영국 워스스터실르 베스퍼드에서 William Clopton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1430년 12월 그녀의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Clopton, Gloucestershire, England: Clopton, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Besford nasceu em 1386, em Besford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alexander Besford, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Thorndon, tinha 64 anos. Ela casou-se com William Clopton em 1402, em Besford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente dezembro de 1430, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Besford родилась в 1386 г. в местности бесфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Alexander Besford было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Thorndon, 64. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Clopton в 1402 г. в местности бесфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла около декабрь 1430 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Besford nació en 1386, en Besford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alexander Besford, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Beatrice Thorndon, tenía 64 años. Se casó con William Clopton en 1402, en Besford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente diciembre de 1430, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años.
